title: Buttery Bun Rolls
description: Soft and fluffy bun rolls smothered in a rich buttery goodness. Perfect as a side dish or as a base for your favorite sandwich.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine softened butter, diced potato, and a pinch of salt. Mix until well combined.
Separate bun rolls into individual pieces and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Using a spoon, spread a generous amount of the butter and potato mixture onto each bun roll.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
